reforms.description: Colombia has implemented a sizeable infrastructure package worth 1.4% of GDP, aimed at alleviating bottlenecks in transportation and logistics, which will support economic recovery and enhance productivity.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving infrastructure reduces production costs and enhances logistics efficiency, which can lead to increased productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: A sizeable infrastructure package designed in response to the pandemic has been implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant investment in infrastructure that is expected to have widespread effects on productivity and economic recovery, addressing long-standing bottlenecks.
reforms.source_quote: A sizeable infrastructure package designed in response to the pandemic, worth 1.4% of GDP, will alleviate some bottlenecks, besides supporting the recovery.
